steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to emphasize a difference between the two supercontinents. The notes give one clear contrast: Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago, while Euramerica formed about 300 million years ago—a gap of roughly 2.8 billion years.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Euramerica formed about 300 million years ago, but Ur formed much earlier—about 3.1 billion years ago.': Names both supercontinents, uses "but" and "much earlier" to directly contrast their formation times. ✓
  • Choice B — 'Forming and breaking apart over hundreds of millions of years, supercontinents are made up of most or all of Earth's continents.': Describes supercontinents in general; neither Ur nor Euramerica is named, so no comparison is possible. ✗
  • Choice C — 'Ur and Euramerica were both supercontinents, single landmasses made up of most or all of Earth's continents.': Emphasizes a similarity ("both supercontinents"), not a difference. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Ur formed about 3.1 billion years ago but eventually broke apart.': Mentions only Ur; Euramerica never appears, so there is nothing to compare. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
